words.clue: Fibrocartilagenous tube from C6 to T4 with C-shaped cartilage rings
Life-threatening condition with air under pressure in the pleural cavity
Part of the left upper lobe that is the functional equivalent of the right middle lobe

Internal ridge at the tracheal bifurcation
The wider shorter and more vertical main bronchus
